mapper.insert: insert into mw_log(level, path, `get`, post, message, ip, user_agent, referer, user_id, username, create_time) values (#{level}, #{path}, #{get}, #{post}, #{message}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{referer}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select log_id, level, path, `get`, post, message, ip, user_agent, referer, user_id, username, create_time from mw_log where log_id = #{logId} limit 1

select log_id, level, path, `get`, post, message, ip, user_agent, referer, user_id, username, create_time from mw_log where 1 = 1 and level = #{level} and message like concat('%', #{message}, '%') and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%') order by log_id desc
select log_id, level, path, `get`, post, message, ip, user_agent, referer, user_id, username, create_time from mw_log where level = #{level} order by log_id desc
